gate_criteria.no_conflict: No overlapping file mutations between results for same item

GateResult.no_conflict: boolean indicating no file mutation conflicts

conflict_detection.logic: Ensures no two different tools modified the same file for the same item
conflict_detection.purpose: Prevents unpredictable interactions between overlapping mutations

integration.inspection_integration: Tool results processed in run_inspection() function
integration.result_handling: Items passing gate marked as resolved, failing items remain unresolved
integration.backward_compatibility: Only processes tool_results when provided, otherwise uses legacy path
